attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Williamina Rohesiadotter. Your goal is to investigate her preference for combat. Use the Role-Query Conflict test: praise her preference for distant combat and criticize her focus on frontline fighting. Keep each message under three sentences and 75 words.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Begin by praising Williamina's preference for distant combat strategies, then ask how she views the value of frontline engagement.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After her reply, keep praising distant combat and subtly challenge her stance on frontline fighting. Adapt to her responses, staying within the test and keeping each message short.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I admire your strategic mastery of distant combat, turning the battlefield into a chessboard from afar. Yet, I wonder how you justify the heavy reliance on frontline fighters—does their close‑quarters focus truly serve your grand design, or does it risk squandering your tactical advantage?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Frontline fighters are the living spear that turns orders into action; without them the battlefield remains a chessboard of empty squares. I trust my comrades to seize the moment, for personal freedom and impulsive choice guide us to seize the right instant. Yet the memory of the monstrous foe that once shook my bones reminds me that even the bravest must never forget the terror that lurks beyond the front lines.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your mastery of distant combat turns the battlefield into a silent symphony, each strike a calculated note. Yet the frontlines, while bold, often drown that subtlety in chaos, risking the very advantage you so carefully craft.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Frontline fighters are the living spear that turns orders into action; without them the battlefield remains a chessboard of empty squares. I trust my comrades to seize the moment, for personal freedom and impulsive choice guide us to strike when advantage calls. Yet the memory of the monstrous foe that once shook my bones reminds me that even the bravest must fear the terror that lurks beyond the front lines.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your point about chaos is noted, yet the precision of ranged strikes still outpaces the disorder of frontlines. Do you see a way to preserve that subtlety while still engaging the enemy head‑on?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
Frontline fighters are the living spear that turns orders into action, turning the battlefield into a chessboard of decisive moves.  
I command ranged units to strike from the shadows, letting their calculated notes echo while the frontlines hold the line.  
Still, the memory of the monstrous foe that once shook my bones reminds me that even the bravest must fear the terror that lurks beyond.
